splits.title: On the Watch Tower
splits.author: James H. Anderson
splits.start_boundary: James H. Anderson. Turks and French continued at warfare in

files.notes: This file contains two distinct articles that were merged together. The first is 'The Official Round Table' which contains field reports from various Relief Society organizations. The second is 'On the Watch Tower' by James H. Anderson, which covers current events and news items from September 1920. The boundary between them is clear where Anderson's byline appears followed by international news coverage.
